goals.objective: Fix all failing tests so npm run test exits green across all workspaces.
acceptance_criteria: npm run test exits 0 for @djimitflo/server.
swarm-resource-plan.test.ts does not timeout.
npm run type-check exits 0.
npm run lint exits 0.

goals.objective: Verify learning-flywheel-smoke covers Phase 7 tasks and check them off.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 Phase 7 tasks in knowledge-runtime-learning-flywheel are checked.
openspec validate knowledge-runtime-learning-flywheel --strict exits 0.
openspec validate prove-learning-flywheel-operator-loop --strict exits 0.

goals.objective: Review, group and commit all 39 uncommitted files with OpenSpec references.
acceptance_criteria: git status --short is empty.
git diff --check is clean.
git log shows grouped commits with OpenSpec change IDs.

goals.objective: Add mission, task and decision-state models linking goals, loop-runs, panels, claims, capabilities and worker leases.
acceptance_criteria: swarm_missions, swarm_tasks, swarm_decisions tables exist.
State transitions follow observed→hypothesized→planned→queued→prepared→running→checking→ready_for_human_merge→completed|blocked|rejected|escalated.
Active execution requires runtime evidence.
Illegal transition tests pass.

goals.objective: Add typed capability registry with contract validation and status gates.
acceptance_criteria: Contract fields: allowed_actions, forbidden_actions, required_evidence, eval_threshold, risk_ceiling, removal_strategy.
Draft and candidate capabilities cannot route live workers.
Validated capability routes within risk ceiling.
Live routing refusal tests pass.

goals.objective: Add specialist council and hypothesis workbench with dissent preservation.
acceptance_criteria: Specialist profiles, panels, reviews tables exist.
High/critical risk requires security reviewer.
Reviews record support, oppose, uncertain, dissent.
Consensus-to-backlog projection does not start workers.
Unknown specialist refusal and duplicate backlog prevention tests pass.

goals.objective: Add evidence graph and claim ledger with contradiction detection and memory classification.
acceptance_criteria: swarm_claims table with source refs, confidence, contradiction links, promotion status.
evidence_edges table connects all runtime entities.
Memory candidate classification: operational, engineering_rule, policy_rule, rejected_secret_like.
Contradiction detection and secret-like rejection tests pass.
Policy memory requires human review.

goals.objective: Add queue classes, fair-share scheduling, budget enforcement and kill handling.
acceptance_criteria: Queue classes: research, doc_fix, test_repair, security, memory, policy.
Per-runtime fair-share scheduling respects weights.
Exhausted budget blocks new worker starts.
Kill/timeout handling includes trace spans and checkpoints.
Fair-share, budget, kill evidence tests pass.

goals.objective: Add deterministic scorecards for skills, specialists, memory, routing and worker outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: Eval targets for skill contracts, specialist outputs, memory retrieval, routing decisions, worker outcomes.
Deterministic scorecards with pass thresholds and evidence refs.
Advisory LLM evals cannot override deterministic gates.
Regression fixtures for known-bad skills fail.

goals.objective: Add dashboard views for registry, active execution, queue, capacity, specialists, evidence graph.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build --workspace=@djimitflo/dashboard exits 0.
Dashboard shows active execution from runtime evidence only.
Registry count is not shown as active execution.
Specialist council view shows panel state, consensus, dissent.
Evidence graph view filters contradicted, review-required, promoted.

goals.objective: Add evaluator quorum, split-decision rules, runner audit manifests, replay branches, warning gates, circuit breakers.
acceptance_criteria: Quorum missing blocks high-risk work.
Split decision creates child work items.
Runner audit manifests for start, skip, fail, stop, kill.
Replay branch has zero copied leases.
Warning gate and circuit breaker tests pass.

goals.objective: Run full mock-runtime scenario from question to panel to backlog to goal to leases to checker to evidence graph.
acceptance_criteria: Full scenario completes with mock runtime.
Evidence graph has nodes for every entity.
No auto-merge, push, deploy or high-risk unattended execution.
Smoke is a passing test in the suite.
npm run test exits 0 with G14.9 smoke included.
